description: Style Note If you prefer backpacks in plain attractive shades then here’s a good one from quiksilver. The chili pepper backpack with matching straps comes in an irresistible cool shade that appeals to your aesthetic senses and also provides enough space for all your things. Product Details Red backpack with branding in the front and on one shoulder strapTwo adjustable padded shoulder straps and one short haul handle One main zippered compartmentOne concealed zipped compartment in the front with an internal pocket Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when needed Size Height: 40 cmWidth: 30 cm  Depth: 14 cm
